title: Revenge of the Sith (Star Wars Miniatures)

'''''Revenge of the Sith''''' was the third expansion to [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game. Released on [[April 2]], [[2005]], it focuses on characters from the [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] movie. As with the previous expansions, miniatures could be purchased in a booster pack of seven random miniatures, or a "Starter game," which contained six miniatures ([[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|Supreme Commander]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], two [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], and two [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|super battle droids]]), a map (a starship, probably Level 10), a rulebook, and all necessary pieces to play a game. The box artwork was done by [[Tomás Giorello]].
